title: 皐月賞の後に・私のために☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky isn't able to win the first Classic Triple
Crown, the Satsuki Sho. A rare look of frustration
crosses her face.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her problems are only compounded by her rival,
Special Week, who is single-minded in her drive
to conquer the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way home, Seiun Sky receives a call from
her grandfather who praises her hard work. It
turns out her participation in the Classics has
been his dream.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite this, she's kept her composure and
remained herself. It's time to prepare for the
Japanese Derby, the second race of the Classic
Triple Crown.
